job_title: Software Engineer (Cloud-Native & Mobile Focus), GovTech Malaysia
description:
The Government Technology Malaysia (GovTech Malaysia), is a special unit under the Ministry of Digital (“Ministry”) mandated to intensify Malaysia digital revolution. For the avoidance of doubt, MyDIGITAL Corporation serves solely as the contracting legal entity for the purpose of administering appointments.
GovTech Malaysia is seeking Technical and Experience Talents to operate as a highly autonomous technical leader, responsible for delivering scalable, secure, and user-centric digital solutions at national scale. In this role, you will go beyond implementation, shaping engineering standards, elevating delivery practices, and mentoring the next generation of engineers. You will work within cross-functional product squads, contributing to mission-critical systems that serve citizens and government stakeholders.
We invite passionate, forward-thinking professionals with expertise in digital transformation, public sector innovation, and technology-driven development to join us in shaping the future of GovTech Malaysia.
KEY RESPONSIBILITIES
1. Application Development & Delivery
-Design, develop, and maintain high-quality applications using
Flutter
,
Firebase
, and
cloud services (AWS/GCP)
-Implement scalable, modular architectures aligned with enterprise and GovTech standards
-Ensure code is well-tested, secure, and production-ready
2.Cross-Functional Collaboration
-Work closely with
product managers, UI/UX designers, analysts, and operations teams
-Participate actively in sprint planning, backlog refinement, and technical discussions
-Contribute to shaping product direction through technical insights
3.UI/UX Integration & User-Centric Engineering
-Translate UI/UX designs into responsive, high-performance applications
-Ensure consistency across platforms (mobile, web)
-Advocate for usability, accessibility, and intuitive user journeys
4.Performance & Scalability Optimization
-Identify system bottlenecks and optimise application performance
-Ensure high availability, responsiveness, and efficient resource utilisation
-Continuously improve system scalability to support growing user demands
5.API & System Integration
-Design and integrate
RESTful APIs
and backend services
-Connect with third-party systems and government platforms securely
-Ensure data integrity, reliability, and real-time responsiveness
6.Code Quality, Standards & Governance
-Maintain high standards of clean, readable, and maintainable code
-Enforce coding standards, version control practices, and peer reviews
-Contribute to engineering guidelines and reusable components
7.Continuous Learning & Innovation
-Stay current with advancements in
Flutter, cloud computing, and software engineering practices
-Explore and adopt new tools, frameworks, and methodologies where relevant
-Contribute to innovation initiatives within the team or organisation
CORE QUALIFICATIONS & EXPERIENCE
1.Modern Software Engineering Expertise
Proven experience building, maintaining, and scaling applications using
two or more modern programming languages
(e.g., Dart, JavaScript/TypeScript, Python, Java, Go), with a strong grasp of:
Software design patterns (e.g., MVC, Clean Architecture, Domain-Driven Design)
Data modelling and system design principles
Modular, reusable, and maintainable code structures
2.Cloud-Native Development (AWS & Multi-Cloud Awareness)
Hands-on experience designing and deploying
cloud-native applications
, preferably on AWS, including:
Microservices and serverless architectures
API-first design and integration (REST/GraphQL)
CI/CD pipelines (GitHub Actions, GitLab CI, Jenkins, etc.)
Infrastructure-as-Code (e.g., Terraform, CloudFormation)
3.Engineering Excellence & Secure Development
Strong working knowledge of:
Test-Driven Development (TDD) and Behaviour-Driven Development (BDD)
Automated testing (unit, integration, end-to-end)
Secure coding practices aligned with OWASP standards
Code quality tools and static analysis
4.Observability & Production Readiness
Experience implementing and managing:
Logging, monitoring, and alerting systems (e.g., CloudWatch, Prometheus, Grafana)
Application performance monitoring (APM)
Root cause analysis and system diagnostics in live environments
5.Production Support & Reliability Engineering
Demonstrated experience in:
Incident management and troubleshooting in production
On-call rotations and service reliability ownership
Post-mortem analysis and continuous improvement practices
6.Leadership & Community Contribution
Experience mentoring junior engineers and guiding best practices
Active contribution to internal knowledge sharing or external tech communities
Ability to influence engineering culture and standards
7.Communication & Collaboration
Strong interpersonal and communication skills
Ability to translate technical concepts for non-technical stakeholders
Comfortable working in cross-functional teams and agile environments
Data-driven mindset for decision making
Beyond technical skills, this role requires someone who:
-Thinks
end-to-end
(coding, but delivery, users, and impact)
-Can operate in
GovTech complexity
(multiple stakeholders, integrations, security constraints)
-Balances
speed vs quality vs governance
-Has ownership mindset;
build, run, improve
